vector_descriptions.bosscrafts_crest: Outer circle + inner ring. Center anvil silhouette at 45-degree geometry. 8-tooth gear behind anvil rotated 30 degrees. Vertical sword overlay centered tip-down with ember sparks at tip.
vector_descriptions.runebus: Two concentric circles. Six runic marks spaced on inner ring. Three connectors forming a triangle circuit with pulse nodes at intersections.
vector_descriptions.agentforge: Hammer at 35-degree strike angle over hexagonal sigil plate, with three spark rays and circular frame.
vector_descriptions.bossgate: Double portal ring, center lock glyph, four radial energy lines, optional blue-gold travel gradient overlay.
vector_descriptions.soundstage: Tuning fork with three resonance arcs and a small runic base glyph.
vector_descriptions.folder_default: Rounded folder silhouette, thin gold linework, anvil emblem in lower-right corner.
vector_descriptions.folder_daemons: Folder silhouette with three-point flame glyph.
vector_descriptions.folder_rituals: Folder silhouette with triple-ring ritual mark.
vector_descriptions.folder_schemas: Folder silhouette with blueprint grid mark.
vector_descriptions.ext_rune: Rounded-square frame, angular rune center, circuit branches from corners.
vector_descriptions.ext_forge: Rounded-square frame with hammer and plate.
vector_descriptions.ext_sigil: Rounded-square frame with sigil circle and inner glyph.
vector_descriptions.ext_ritual: Rounded-square frame with multi-ring ritual diagram.
vector_descriptions.ext_agent_json: Rounded-square frame with scroll silhouette and agent head glyph.
vector_descriptions.ext_bossgate: Rounded-square frame with envelope silhouette and lock overlay.
vector_descriptions.type_controller: Helm wheel sigil inside circular frame.
vector_descriptions.tray_active: Anvil-gear mark with active inner ring rotation layer.
vector_descriptions.tray_alert: Anvil-gear with red pulse and crack glyph.
vector_descriptions.tray_daemon_runeforge: Tray mark with runeforge orange accent.
